transcript.text: Hey, Kaitlin.
Hey, guys.
Oh, you're on mute.
I know Tiago is going to demo, but it looks like that will not be happening today.
We've got a last-minute notification of that.
So next week would be better, and we can move – we have to move our meeting next week anyways because our board meeting is on Thursday.
So maybe we can do, like, Friday.
That might work better for us.
And, yeah.
Sounds good.
And then I am working on the things that you sent me that is super useful, that list.
So I'm working on putting those together.
Thank you.
Just one second here.
Oh, okay.
Yeah, so that's just the update from my end.
Perfect.
Sounds good.
Yeah.
Let me share my screen.
think I'll go through the updates real quick.
So, yeah, generally, things are going as planned.
We are cleaning the broken internal links because we deleted, we'd unpublished a bunch of articles previously.
Yeah.
So we're just cleaning up those links and existing content.
Should be finished by early next week.
And then we're still working on the newsletter outline and design templates.
And then, of course, product demo for next week.
So this past week, we published five editorial articles.
And then we also lined up a bunch of refreshes and published them too.
For the programmatic workstream, we're kind of hoping for an update on the website design and any support from the web dev.
Any idea regarding when the website will be up and ready?
Yeah, honestly, this is just waiting Tiago's review.
I mean, a lot of it's ready for version one.
I met with them today.
There's actually something I want to talk about the blogs a little bit.
Because on the blog page right now, and I don't know if this comes from tagging that you guys have on the blogs, but on the category, on their dropdown, it's just kind of very messy.
Because it's like AI for real estate, AI for this.
And so it'd probably be better if it just was like real estate, right?
And I think one of those things, and I don't know the best way to go about this, maybe this is something you guys can do, is they did send me the list of all the tags.
But I think those are coming from you, and I think we should clean those up.
Because someone's going to want like real estate, maybe like AI has its own tag and things can have multiple tags on them.
But it's just like a really hard way to search for the blogs.
And there's a lot, obviously.
Yeah.
The tags are very wordy.
And I think we can have multiple tags on them.
And if we can clean that up, that would be really great.
Yeah, totally hear you on that.
But I remember we spoke about this with Thiago like a few months back, back when we were in that freelancer design phase.
So what he had done, I think Renato kind of implemented this as well, along with one of the designers.
They created a new category field called industry topic or blog category or something.
Like it's still there in the CMS in the back end.
So we've been kind of filling that out.
And then the idea.
That is a far more condensed list.
And the idea was that to whatever field is displayed on the left-hand side of the blog, it'll be that main blog category field.
So I think that was part of the web design changes that Thiago wanted to make.
So I think once that change is made, it'll clean up on the left-hand side.
So that was the plan.
Okay, once that change is made, where?
So on the left-hand side of the blog, it's displaying field X, right?
But there is another field Y in the CMS that is a far more condensed list.
And all blogs have already been categorized for that field.
So it just needs to switch, basically, in the back end.
let me, yeah, got it.
Okay, and just so I'm gonna...
Because right now you're saying this is like...
I don't know.
Thank
Is X, or is this field Y?
Sorry, I'm just looking at your screen now.
Yeah, so this is field X, which is like super huge.
instead of saying filter by category, there's another field in the backend that is basically main block category essentially.
So that field just needs to be mapped to this particular button on the front end.
Got it, another field.
It's called what?
I think it's called main block category.
I could send a screenshot of it after this.
Yeah, that would be helpful.
Yeah, for sure.
Okay, and we want to filter by that one instead, right?
And that's gonna be more condensed.
But is it still, they only have one option, like everything is only tagged to one thing?
Uh, yes.
Well, technically.
That's two fields that Tiago wanted.
So it kind of depends on how he wants to categorize these blogs on the front end, on the web page itself.
Yeah, because I think some of these would be nice to have multiple tags, like just going off of this list.
Like, okay, this could be AI, but it also could be, you know, construction or I don't know for like sales and also AI, right?
Because like, I don't know, because there's so many blogs, it's just going to help people filter it.
Yeah, we have like 800 blogs.

Yeah, and I think this is just something like, I don't know how you guys categorize them, but moving forward, having that so we can, you know, when people are searching, they can get to what they're looking for.
It's just going to be more helpful.
So maybe there's just a way that we think about this as we're doing future blogs.
that time.
And I don't know if there's like a master list of these categories too.
Maybe I just haven't seen it.
Yeah, it's kind of, it's all listed in the Webflow backend.
Got it.
to get a point about the multiple categories, that's kind of taken care of because there's two fields.
What we have is we have the use case and we have the industry, essentially.
So, for example, it'll be proposal management.
Got it.
Okay.
So, the work to be done here is just that the web design team kind of needs to just make that mapping to your front end.
And then things will just kind of sort themselves.
So, that was how we left it with Tiago.
Got it.
Yeah.
If you can send me that screenshot, I also ping them and let them know.
That'll be super helpful.
Yep, for sure.
Let me reshare my screen real quick.
So, yeah.
Okay, well, that is a bit of an easier task then.
Yeah.
And I was like, oh no, this sounds awful.
That's like, I know we were looking at the web design today and I was like, these categories, I can't.
Sure.
And apologies if you mentioned, but it sounds like the last step is Tiago's approval on the website.
Is there an ETA on, I know that's like a tricky thing.
Yeah, mean, I'm hoping, about this?

I'm with him in person next week, so I'm hoping I can like sit down with him and like actually walk, like work through things as we're going to be in San Francisco for our board meeting and I'll be out there all week.
So I'm hoping I can get his time.
And then while that's happening too, because this is kind of V1, there are some things that we've kind of hidden for this V1 and stuff like that.
But simultaneously, I'm also working on then like enriching the other part, right?
Like making it better while it's also still waiting.
Like the customer stories page, I went over the new redesign layout for that today.
I gave them access, which is part of the things I'm going to give you guys to like the doc I have with like the quotes and stats and customer stories.
So we're still like working on some events pages, webinar page that when they think is being redesigned.
So that's all kind of happening outside of the V1 push.
Cool.
Okay.
Sounds good.
Awesome.
That's exciting.
Oh, yeah.
I'm going to be happy once it's live.
I was just on a call with an investor and he's like, I was looking at your website.
I'm like, oh, he's like, I'm kind of confused.
I'm like, I know.
I don't get it right now.
I'm like, oh, she's ugly.
Well, it's about to look very, very good.
Yeah.
Cool.
Cool.
So moving on to the performance side of things.
we're kind of in this holding pattern for...
One of the reasons this is happening is that Google has been targeting a lot of bot-based traffic over the past month.
So that's one of the reasons why non-branded impressions were slightly down.
We haven't been hit massively with it, so it's pretty good news.
But generally, traffic is holding.
The other reason, of course, is that our publishing volume has decreased quite significantly, so we're not going get those massive upswings.
But we're in a good position, and the refreshes should start to take hold over the next couple of weeks or so, as Google kind of picks that up.
So we're pretty positive overall, hoping to see this chart make new peaks, essentially.
Some good news regarding the content category.
So we had the new editorial cluster, which is AI at scale.
That's targeting AI product managers, AI agent designers, et cetera.
Who are, they are, would mention they are some of the key decisions.
So we started attracting sessions over there and pretty good position, like they're ranking well too.
So generally that's pretty good.
We'd refresh some blogs in the marketing documents cluster, basically automating document creation and processes there.
So those are getting increased clicks or positive signs in terms of refreshes.
And then generally AI agents for, you know, government law, healthcare insurance, which have traditionally performed well, they continue to do well.
The positions overall are stable.
So performance is kind of holding in place.
And then with regards to LLM traffic, we saw a slight decrease.
Generally referrals across the board were slightly down.
But again, it's not like a huge drop or anything of that sort.
So generally things are pretty stable performance wise.
And yeah, once the refreshes kick in, we should start seeing new highs over here.
So yeah, that's.
See, that's the performance update, generally.
Okay, great.
Awesome.
And then it sounds like we'll do the demo next week, which will be excellent.
Yes.
Yeah.
Let's actually schedule that at the end of this call.
Yeah.
Do we want to do it just during our typical sync?
No.
Our typical sync, I need to move, because we have our board meeting.
So, I mean, we can do it during our typical sync.
I think that's the best way.
Friday at, what time is this?
Pacific would work best.
Okay.
Same time Friday.
We can do that next week.
I'll just move around.
Do do do do do
All righty.
And you said 10 a.m.
Pacific?
Yeah, that would be ideal.
Okay, let me just move it.
Great.
Okay, should be good if I did that conversion correctly.
And then just the other thing, I haven't seen, I don't know if it was sent to Tiago, but I haven't seen anything come through about our new contract.
Great reminder, Andy, I'm sure you can start in there.
I joined to address the little questions and little bombs that I started two weeks ago.
So, yeah, Bridget's working on that.
I think you'll have a conference this week, but it is on the radar.
Okay, cool.
And then.
I just saw that the design team picked up that template ticket yesterday.
checked on the link, but if you can send over any of that stuff that Mara sent, like that list, it would be helpful in parallel.
Yeah, I told her I was, I'm collecting all of the things.
I actually have two, like the person that's doing a lot of content for the website and you guys, so I'm kind of like mass collecting everything.
So there might be like anything here, this folder is just going to have for everyone, all the stuff that they need.
And there's definitely overlap.
So amazing.
You're like, need to stop like sending it one off and like one at a time.
I'm like, I just need one big folder.
Be like here, it lives here.
Yeah.
Cool.
Anything else?
I think that's it.
If anything comes up as always, just like ping us over Slack.
Hope you guys have a nice time in San Francisco.
Next week also in board meeting.
Yeah.
Um, yeah, you know, I think it should, been a, been a good, good time lately, been busy.
So that's always a good sign.
Yeah.
Um, all right.
Well, thank you so much.
Yeah.
Thank you.
Okay.
We'll chat with you next week.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on website progress, content performance, and schedule next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Website Launch Blocked:** The V1 website launch is blocked pending Tiago's final review. Kaitlin will meet Tiago in person next week to secure approval.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Blog Filter Fix:** The blog's messy filter list will be fixed by mapping the front-end to a pre-existing, condensed CMS field (`main block category`) instead of the current verbose tags.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Performance Stable:** Traffic is stable despite a Google bot-traffic filter and reduced publishing volume. The new "AI at scale" cluster is performing well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Meeting Rescheduled:** Next week's sync is moved to Friday, 10 AM Pacific, to accommodate a board meeting and include a product demo.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

## Topics

### Website & Blog Filter

  - [**V1 Website Status:** Launch is blocked pending Tiago's final review.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Action:** Kaitlin will meet Tiago in person next week in SF to secure approval.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Context:** The current site is confusing to investors, making the V1 launch a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Blog Filter Issue:** The current filter dropdown is unusable due to verbose tags (e.g., "AI for real estate").](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Solution:** Map the front-end filter to the CMS field `main block category`.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This field was created specifically for a condensed list, and all 800+ blogs are already categorized.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [**Future Improvement:** Implement multi-select filtering (e.g., "AI" + "Construction").](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Status:** The CMS already supports this with separate `use case` and `industry` fields, requiring only a front-end UI update.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### Content & Performance

  - [**Performance Context:** Traffic is stable despite two factors:](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [Google's recent filtering of bot traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
      - [A temporary decrease in publishing volume.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Positive Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**New Cluster:** "AI at scale" (targeting AI product managers) is attracting sessions and ranking well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Updated articles in the "marketing documents" cluster are seeing increased clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Stable Performers:** AI agents for government, law, and healthcare continue to perform well.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [**Outlook:** Performance is expected to rise as recent content refreshes are indexed by Google.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

### Admin & Logistics

  - [**Contract:** The new contract is in progress with Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [**Content Repository:** Kaitlin is creating a central folder for all content assets (quotes, stats, customer stories) to streamline sharing.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Newsletter:** Outline and design templates are in progress.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [**Link Cleanup:** Fixing broken internal links from unpublished articles is expected to finish by early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaitlin:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Secure V1 website approval from Tiago next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Share the central content asset folder with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Send a screenshot of the `main block category` CMS field to Kaitlin.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [**Mara:**](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Reschedule next week's sync to **Friday, 10 AM Pacific**.](https://fathom.video/share/YhQeNqhTzoVyk6jsHF6GSuo_4N7xpxoR?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

action_items.description: Send Kaitlin CMS screenshot of 'main blog category' field
Ping Tiago re: map blog filters to 'main blog category' + 'use case'/'industry'
Share consolidated content folder w/ Mara, Vivek, Andi
